blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — now PSG and Real Madrid face the heat
Bodo/Glimt's 2-1 in Milano is the shock of the round. Real Madrid host Benfica tonight without their key forward (knee injury, per NRK) — the tie is far more open than the odds suggest.
⛳ Thu 06:00 — Cognizant Classic tees off in Florida, Reitan & Ventura carry Norwegian hopes
🎮 Fri 16:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) back in action, ESL Pro League Season 23
